REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1450 Lyon St, San Francisco, Ca 94115)
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kelly E. Dankbar for administrator Michael F. Storz.
Azita Rahim for heir-at-law Willis Green (via Zoom).
Lan Zhang, buyer.

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Sale and Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property located at 1450 Lyon Street, San Francisco, CA 94115. The Court announced the currently accepted bid made in the amount of $775,000, with the first overbid set at $814,250. No overbids were made.

The Court therefore confirmed the sale of the property located at 1450 Lyon Street, San Francisco, in the amount of $775,000, on the terms and conditions set forth in the Report of Sale.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Joan Foggy (petitioner).
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Willis Green (heir at law).
Kelly Dankbar appeared by zoom for Michael Storz (petitioner/special administrator).

The court asked, "what's the path forward"? Mr. Wroble stated that he has nothing further to add other than what is in his supplement and that it's really the court's discretion. Mrs. Dankbar stated that both parties have equal priority, referred to Probate Code 8467, stated that the court can appoint both parties which will not work here and noted that in the initial competing petitions, the court appointed Bruce over Joan. Mrs. Rahim stated that Joan is not fit to serve. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Michael Storz is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Saenz. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for and with Joan Foggy (petitioner) in person.
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for and with Willis Green (heir at law) by zoom.
Kelly Dankbar appeared by zoom for and with Micheal Storz (special administrator/petitioner) by zoom.

Mrs. Dankbar stated that with the extra authority that was given to her client, they were able to obtain a loan to pay off the foreclosure loan and save the property from foreclosure, and that they are still waiting to receive the surplus funds from the Stingray property. Mr. Rahim stated that her client is a half sibling, that they have the same father and that the mother is Annie Mae Simpson. The court noted that neither party gave notice to Willis Green. Mrs. Rahim stated that she will not waive notice, that she has communicated with Mrs. Dankbar, but not with Mr. Worth, that her client is not seeking his own appointment and that her client is in support of Mr. Storz's petition. Further discussion was held regarding Willis Green having equal priority as Mrs. Foggy if he is a half sibling, the special administrator not being an heir and Mrs. Foggy having priority over the special administrator, Mr. Storz being a nominee of Lamont Foggy, Mrs. Rahim's position that Mrs. Foggy is not fit to serve and that her appointment would create a lot of deficiencies, Mr. Worth's position that he has not seen proof of heirship with respect to Mr. Green and whether he has any standing without any proof, etc. Mrs. Foggy presented oral objections with respect to the type of loan that was obtained by Mr. Storz. The Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to October 14, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Joan Foggy (petitioner).
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Willis Green (heir at law).
Kelly Dankbar appeared by zoom for and with Michael Storz (special administrator).
Lamont Foggy in propria persona.

The court expressed concern about the San Francisco real property being scheduled for foreclosure on August 7th and questions whether it makes sense to continue with temporary administration to get over this hurdle. Mr. Storz stated that he has a lender in place to cover the entirety of the Wells Fargo loan, that they have excess funds from the Stingray property foreclosure sale, but they don't know how much and that there are other claims on those funds. Mrs. Dankbar noted that as a special administrator, Mr. Storz does not have authority to obtain a loan on the property and that he will need additional powers under Probate Code 8544(b). Mr. Wrobel stated that he agrees with the court that it doesn't make sense to change anything right now and that he does not object with expanded authority to obtain a loan. Mrs. Rahim stated that she would like to see Mr. Storz' powers expanded and that she has not filed objections to Mr. Worth's petition. Mr. Foggy stated that he does not agree to his sister being appointed. The Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to August 28, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Special administration is extended and is to include additional powers under Probate Code 8544(b). Mrs. Dankbar is to prepare an order, circulate it to Mrs. Rahim and to Mr. Worth, and e-mail it to Mr. Miyauchi (probate examiner).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

Petition Request To Appoint As Administrator Joan Lynn Foggy As Administrator Re: Death Of Bruce Edward Foggy, Administrator
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Joan Foggy (petitioner).
Kelly Dankbar appeared by zoom for and with Michael Storz (special administrator) by zoom.
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Willis Green (heir at law).

Mrs. Dankbar stated that the special administrator was able to marshal a bank account with a balance of $11,000.00, that he collected back rent at the Lyon Street property from one tenant, that he obtained payoff amounts for each mortgage and that the Sacramento property is still scheduled for foreclosure tomorrow. Mrs. Dankbar also stated that the San Francisco property has a reinstatement amount of $75,000.00 with a payoff amount of $500,000.00, that she saw on a website a foreclosure date of August 4th on the San Francisco property and that as a third party, they were not intending on taking a position on Mrs. Foggy's petition. Mr. Wrobel stated that he has looked at the list from probate examiner, that a supplemental declaration is prepared, but it hasn't been filed yet because it is not verified, and that he believes his client is bondable with a joint control agreement. The court expressed concerns about this estate because of the complicated issues with regard to the mortgages and noted that Mr. Storz will keep going forward with the special letters and that the letters will last until the court orders something else. Mrs. Dankbar expressed concern stating that if they cannot get an extension of the foreclosure, the Sacramento property may be lost. The Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to July 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow time for Mrs. Foggy to clear up all of the issues and for Mr. Storz to continue as the special administrator.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelly DAnkbar appeared by zoom for Michael Storz (petitioner).
Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for and with Joan Foggy in person.
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Willis Green (heir).

The court noted that Mr. Wrobel has filed a petition and that it is pending in the e-file queue. No one objects to the matter being continued. Mrs. Dankbar raised the issue of the property that is going into foreclosure and the need to have the temporary letters extended as they expire today. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Wrobel's petition to post. Today's petition will then be continued to the same hearing date that is given to Mr. Wrobel's petition. The court will sign the order extending special administration to either June 5, 2024, or to the date given to Mr. Wrobel's petition. Status on close of estate currently set for August 26, 2024 is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Miranda Fernandez, Esq., via Zoom, for Bruce Foggy, Petitioner; Joan Foggy, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner; Azita Rahim, Esq., via Zoom, for interested party.

The court points Joan Foggy to the defects with her petition and acknowledges that if the court were to appoint Bruce Foggy, a bond would be ordered. Ms. Foggy offers testimony regarding the court's query. Ms. Rahim offers advocacy for the appointment of Bruce Foggy. Ms. Fernandez reminds the court of the defects of Joan Foggy's petition and advocates for the appointment of her client as Administrator.

After additional discussion, the Court granted Bruce Foggy's Petition for Letters of Administration. Bruce Foggy is appointed Administrator of the Estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,660,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-26-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Joan Foggy's Petition for Letters of Administration is denied in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
